title: Shingeki No Craft Hand Bite Resource Pack
description: Hand Bite Resource Pack for the Hand Bite Datapack
body:
IMPORTANT: Required Datapack
You need the SNC Resource Pack installed in your world/server, and the Hand Bite Datapack

The version depends on what version of SNC you are using

This is the Hand Bite Resource Pack and it is very important for your gameplay

You also need the SNC resource pack
